reason: Redundant classifyIntent calls are a micro-performance advisory, not a correctness or security issue. Iter 9 downgrade confirmed.

detail: P2->P1 upgrade scan: 0 upgrades. All P2 clusters remain P2 individually and cumulatively. Entity-density error-handling cluster (P2-008+P2-C-001+ADV-003) has bounded 60s impact and independent intent gate.

P1 sanity check: P1-001 downgraded to P2 (confirmed). P1-002 defensible but borderline (3rd-party might argue P2). P1-003 likely OBE -- resource-map itself shows status=OK. P1-C-001 confirmed P1 -- functional gap with bounded 60s impact.

rationale: 0 P0 security/data-loss blockers. 2-3 P1 correctness issues (P1-C-001 cache invalidation unwired; P1-002 playbook path wrong; P1-003 likely OBE). 39 P2 advisories across all dimensions. All 4 dimensions covered. Convergence reached (ratio 0.09). Implementation solid -- all REQs tested and verified.
